data.body:
Epic 2 plan review COMPLETE. All three Epic-2-scope tickets carry a certified plan-review attestation: EPIC2 2141 (PASS/certified), F a3d7 cultivated-aquatic-crow (PASS/certified), G ff6f depressant-amethyst-wasp (PASS/certified). Took 3 remediation rounds; the gate caught real authoring gaps (unenumerated edit targets, false premises, per-round-vs-per-criterion threshold, wrong CLI/MCP registration mechanism, broken monkeypatch oracle, no-JS vs collapse-all contradiction) — all fixed with verified specifics.

OWNERSHIP BOUNDARY: this session owns ONLY Epic 2. Epic 1 (courtly-linear-iguana ba33 + A/B/C/D/E) is owned by a concurrent session (90514dff) that is implementing it (A-D closed, E in progress). This session is hands-off Epic 1. NOTE: before the boundary was known, this session applied plan-review description edits to Epic 1 children B/C/D/E (not reverted, to avoid clobbering the other session's concurrent work).

DISCOVERED CAPABILITY GAP (Epic 1's to close): the plan-review sidecar's _slim (plan_review/sidecar.py:374-376) persists coaching as only {move_id, finding_refs}, dropping subject/move_name/rendered prose — so Epic 2's G pass-4 panel cannot render the coaching note. Fix belongs to story A (plan sidecar): persist subject + move_name + rendered coaching in _slim. Code-review sidecar already stores full verdict coaching (not affected). Awaiting user decision on whether to file this as a discovered_from ticket.
